Get n-top linear associations

dot-get_n_top_asssoc.Rd

Currently, n-top linear associations are selected based on values of q_value (column sorted increasing) and values of rho (column sorted decreasing)

Usage

.get_n_top_asssoc(dt_assoc, n_top = 4)

Arguments

dt_assoc

data.table with the calculated linear association between DepMap and metrics outputted by calc_assoc

n_top

number of requested top linear associations

Value

a vector with name of the n-top linear associations; when n_top will be higher than number of available features - only available will be returned.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
Y <- matrix(seq(0.5, 2, length.out = 50), nrow = 50,
            dimnames = list(sprintf("row_%s", 1:50), "met_1"))
X <- matrix(
  withr::with_seed(42, sample(c(NA, seq(0.35, 23.5, 1.25)), 
                              size = 50*20, replace = TRUE)), 
  nrow = 50,
  dimnames = list(sprintf("row_%s", 1:50), sprintf("feat_%s", 1:20)))
tab_assoc <- calc_assoc(X, Y)
.get_n_top_asssoc(tab_assoc)
} # }
